---
title: "toeplitz"
generated: true
description: "Toeplitz matrix construction with leading batch support."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.matrix`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:toeplitz -->
```python
toeplitz(c: Float[Array, '... mc'], r: Optional[Float[Array, '... nr']] = None, *, shape: Optional[Tuple[int, int]] = None, fill_value: float = 0.0) -> Float[Array, '... m n']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:toeplitz -->
Toeplitz matrix construction with leading batch support.

Vectorises [`toeplitz_2d`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix/toeplitz_2d.qmd) over any leading axes; both `c` and
`r` must share the same leading batch shape.  See
[`toeplitz_2d`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix/toeplitz_2d.qmd) for the per-sample semantics, including the
handling of `shape` and `fill_value`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:toeplitz -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `c` | `Float` | `...` × `mc` | — | First column of each Toeplitz matrix, with arbitrary leading batch axes and a trailing length `mc`. |
| `r` | `Optional[Float[Array, '... nr']]` | — | `None` | First row of each Toeplitz matrix, sharing the leading batch axes of `c` and with trailing length `nr`. If `None`, defaults to `c` (symmetric Toeplitz). |
| `shape` | `Optional[Tuple[int, int]]` | — | `None` | Output `(m, n)` of each Toeplitz block. Defaults to `(mc, nr)`. |
| `fill_value` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Fill for cells outside the support of `c` / `r`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `m` × `n`. The batch of `(m, n)` Toeplitz matrices, carrying the shared leading batch axes of `c` and `r`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:toeplitz -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `mc` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
